message:
test(hash): exhaustive edge-case coverage for util::hex_encode

Add 0x7f single-byte test case and length invariant test to hash.rs
unit tests. Add hex_encode_roundtrip proptest (256 cases, up to 256
bytes) that verifies: output length == 2*input length, all lowercase
hex, and manual from_str_radix decode matches original bytes.

Audit: no lingering {:x} format strings on digest outputs in src/ —
the sha2 0.11 migration to hex_encode is complete and correct. The
only :02x usage (audit.rs:593) formats individual u8 values, not
digest arrays.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
